title: Smoky Crumbled Mediterranean Bread
description: A buttery and light mediterranean dish featuring breadcrumbs infused with smokiness, perfect for a sick-day meal that's also plant-based-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: preferably hot variety for a stronger smoky flavor

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup nutritional yeast
ingredients.notes: optional but adds a cheesy texture and umami flavor

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the bread crumbs, chopped roasted red peppers, smoked paprika, minced garlic, nutritional yeast (if using), salt, and black pepper.
Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven, let it cool slightly before crumbling into smaller pieces if needed.
